title: CBIC Issues Simplified Norms for Return of Export Cargo Amidst West Asia Crisis
content:
# CBIC Issues Simplified Norms for Return of Export Cargo Amidst West Asia Crisis

Ek important update hai! Government ne West Asia crisis ke chalte export cargo jo waapas aa rahe hain, unki smooth handling ke liye simplified customs procedures announce kiye hain.

Central Board of Indirect Taxes and Customs (CBIC) ne yeh special provisions notify kiye hain Section 143AA of the Customs Act, 1962 ke तहत, recognising the exceptional situation affecting international shipping routes and export logistics.

Here are the key highlights of the new norms:

*   **Circular Number & Date:** Circular No. 09/2026-Customs, dated 08th March, 2026.
*   **Validity:** Yeh relaxations Circular issue hone ki date se 15 din tak valid rahenge.
*   **No Bill of Entry:** Vessels carrying returned export cargo, under specific conditions (e.g., not having called at a foreign port), ko port terminal par cargo offload karne ke liye Bill of Entry file karne ki zaroorat nahi hogi.
*   **Verification:** Customs officials container details ko corresponding Shipping Bills se verify karenge aur container seals ki integrity check karenge. Tampered seals hone par 100% examination hoga.
*   **Cancellation of Export Documents:** Export incentives (like IGST refunds, duty drawback) claim na hon, iske liye Shipping Bills aur Let Export Orders ko cancel kiya jayega.
*   **"Back to Town" Facility:** Exporters ki request par, cargo ko unki premises tak waapas le jaane ki "Back to Town" facility bhi provide ki jayegi.
*   **System Updates:** Export General Manifest (EGM) filed hone ke baad Shipping Bills cancel karne ke liye Indian Customs Electronic System (ICES) platform par naya functionality introduce kiya jayega. Tab tak, manual records maintain kiye jayenge.
*   **Information Sharing:** Cancelled Shipping Bills ki details Reserve Bank of India (RBI) aur Directorate General of Foreign Trade (DGFT) jaise agencies ke saath ICEGATE ke through share ki jayegi.

Yeh steps exporters aur shipping lines ko West Asia crisis ke kaaran hone wale disruptions se relief dene ke liye hain.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://www.cbic.gov.in/Customs-Circulars)

*Published on: 9 March 2026*
